title: fumaria agraria var. platyptera
intro: Fumaria agraria var. platyptera, also known as the broad-leaved fumitory, is a plant species belonging to the fumitory family (Fumariaceae) and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Fumaria agraria var. platyptera include its ability to treat a range of health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of the mentioned health issues.
